commands: bash -c 'set -e; cd /home/ubuntu/surf-ai-system/infra; echo "=== BUILDING CONTAINERS ==="; docker-compose build; echo "=== STARTING CONTAINERS ==="; docker-compose up -d; echo "=== RESTARTING NGINX ==="; systemctl restart nginx; echo "=== STATUS REPORT ==="; echo "1. REPO STATUS:"; if [ -d /home/ubuntu/surf-ai-system/.git ]; then echo "OK"; else echo "FAIL"; fi; echo "2. CONTAINERS STATUS:"; docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}"; echo "3. API STATUS:"; curl -s -f http://localhost:8000/health && echo "WORKING" || echo "NOT WORKING"; echo "4. NGINX STATUS:"; systemctl is-active nginx; echo "5. DOMAIN STATUS:"; curl -s -f http://surfing.heyi.co.il/api/health || echo "FAILED"'
